repair_candidate.summary: Repair #89693 on the contributor branch by narrowing optional scanner search-miss handling so required trailing search failures after partial progress remain fatal, while preserving the intended optional-search-miss behavior and contributor attribution.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(cron): narrow optional scanner search miss handling
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repairs #89693 by keeping required trailing scanner search failures fatal even when earlier progress output exists.
- Preserves the optional scanner search-miss behavior only when the payload is explicitly proven optional.
- Adds focused regression coverage for partial progress followed by a required trailing search failure.

## Credit
- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/89693 by henryyuen168-ship-it.
- Carries forward the source PR attribution to Mike's rebased local commit noted in the PR body.

## Validation
- `pnpm -s vitest run src/cron/isolated-agent/helpers.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
credit_notes: Preserve the PR body's attribution to Mike's local commit 61017e26fef06f45d33baefbd25bce51fca56af9 when summarizing the repair.
The repair should be committed as a maintainer edit to the existing contributor branch when possible, preserving GitHub PR authorship.
needs_human: #89696 requires maintainer product/compatibility decision on accepting a default-on low-memory tool guard before any repair or merge path is safe.
#89726 is a draft maintainer-owned PR labeled waiting on author, so Clownfish should not finalize it until the author updates or clears the draft state.
